results.title: Six individual championships highlight second day of WIAA state track
results.description: The Green Bay area had a memorable day at the WIAA state track and field meet June 6, with six individual champions on Day 2 in La Crosse.

results.title: Six individual championships highlight second day of WIAA state track
results.description: The Green Bay area had a memorable day at the WIAA state track and field meet June 6, with six individual champions on Day 2 in La Crosse.

results.title: New Zealand are the World Cup's lowest-ranked team. But their fans believe the Kiwis can fly
results.description: As part of a special World Cup series, The Athletic is speaking to fans of all 48 competing nations to capture their unique football culture

results.title: Lowell Spinners host Johnny Damon celebration
results.description: As the Lowell Spinners continue to celebrate their comeback season, Saturday night they brought in a legend from the comeback Red Sox team, Johnny Damon.

results.title: Banana Ball brings sold-out crowd and hometown connections to Milwaukee
results.description: Fans from Wisconsin and beyond packed American Family Field as Banana Ball brought its fast-paced blend of baseball and entertainment to Milwaukee.

results.title: Gabriel Bonfim sets sights on another former UFC welterweight champion
results.description: Gabriel Bonfim added a former UFC welterweight champion to his resume Saturday – and now he wants another.

results.title: Explorers rally and win 7-4 on the road over the Winnipeg Goldeyes
results.description: SIOUX CITY, IA (KCAU) – The X’s continued their weekend road trip to Canada, playing the Goldeyes Saturday night. A two-run homer from Alberto Osuna would tie it at 4 apiece in the 5th inning, and the momentum would continue to roll. The Explorers play game three of the series on Sunday at 1 pm.

results.title: Mirra Andreeva wins first Grand Slam title at French Open
results.description: Mirra Andreeva, 19, claims her first Grand Slam title at the French Open, defeating Maja Chwalinska in straight sets.
